description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a bold red finish and a modular design. The cabinet features six compartments on the front, four of which have doors with round metallic knobs, and two open shelves in the center. The structure is framed with metallic edges, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance, and it stands on small, round feet for stability. The sides and back are solid red panels, while the front is visually segmented by the metallic frame. The open shelves provide easy access for frequently used items, while the closed compartments offer concealed storage. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A modern red cabinet with metallic framing, featuring four closed compartments with knobs and two open central shelves. Its sleek, modular design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing four closed compartments with round knobs and two open shelves in the center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid red panel framed by metallic edges, with no visible compartments or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous red panel with metallic framing, no openings or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid red panel and metallic frame.
